label: Reliability
items: Smart watering valves are now belt-and-braces safe — a failed shut-off keeps retrying until it succeeds instead of silently giving up.
Weather alerts now arrive as push notifications, and a frost warning no longer hides a wind warning later the same day.
Daily and weekly notification digests can no longer arrive twice, and they now follow your local timezone.
Offline changes sync more reliably: one failed item no longer blocks the queue, retries happen automatically, and the queue is cleared on sign-out.
Ecowitt soil sensors recover automatically after a connection blip instead of staying paused until a manual sync.

label: Schedules & tasks
items: Recurring tasks stay on their intended rhythm — no more duplicate or day-early tasks, especially outside the UK.
Archived and paused schedules no longer keep creating tasks, and pausing hides only the paused dates instead of the whole schedule.
Dashboard counts now match the task list — including homes without locations and gardens with a long history.
Southern-hemisphere growing calendars are now correct: month-based care and harvest windows shift to your seasons.

label: Fixes
items: Editor invites can be redeemed again.
Upgrading your plan unlocks its features immediately — no reload needed.
Harvest windows count once in the week strip, and "completed late" markers are accurate.
Garden Walk cards no longer carry scroll position or photo uploads over to the next plant.
Gardening streaks now count your local days, so evening care sessions don't break them.
Dozens of smaller date, timezone and caching fixes across the app.
